title: [Emberstone Hall, Forge]
description: Heat lingers in this basalt chamber, radiating from a domed brick forge set against the far wall.  A massive invar anvil stands at the room's center, positioned beneath a teardrop-cut amber crystal suspended from a web of fine mithril chains.  A tempering trough rests within arm's reach of the anvil, fed by a copper pipe that runs along the wall.  A shallow eonake-traced niche has been carved into the basalt while a heavy invar-banded door stands opposite the forge.
room.location: Emberstone Hall (Forge), inside the island town of Mist Harbor
